blocks.body: Adverbs (adverbs) and adverbials (circumstances) have their distinct place in an English sentence. Their location depends on the type of adverb.

{ "title": "9. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Frequency (always, often, never): before the main verb, after to be.", "Manner (quickly, well): at the end, after the adverb.", "Place (here, at home): at the end sentence.", "Time (yesterday, every day): at the end or beginning for emphasis.", "Degree (very, quite): before an adjective/adverb.", "Order at the end: Manner → Place → Time." ] }
